name_cn:
In Stock 24a Chain Hobo Bag
Really so cute, the chain is exquisite, and the leather is very soft. It is made of lambskin and has multiple carrying methods: over the shoulder, crossbody, or hand-held. You can choose to buckle it up. Super exquisite.
